plans.page_description: Start free or unlock more depth with Plus or Pro. Choose the plan that feels right for you.
plans.headline: A space that supports the way you care for your relationships
plans.subline: Start free. When you feel you need more depth, Plus or Pro opens the door.

free.title: To get started
free.description: A few first messages so you can feel what it's like to talk with Flavia. No commitment, no card required.

plus.description: Longer conversations, premium content, and Flavia's real voice in your messages.
plus.awaiting_sync: Stripe has already confirmed your payment. Your access will update in a few seconds.

pro.description: For those who want deep, unlimited companionship. Everything in Plus and more.
pro.coming_soon_note: We're finalizing pricing with Flavia. Email us if you want early access.

session_individual.title: A real session with Flavia
session_individual.description: A live one-on-one conversation with Flavia. For when what you're working through deserves her direct attention.

billing_return.success_syncing: We're confirming your plan with Stripe and updating your account status. If it takes a few seconds, this screen will refresh on its own.
billing_return.success_ready: Your subscription is already active and your account status has been updated.
billing_return.cancelled_description: No charge was made. You can try again whenever you want from this same screen.

paywall_card.default_message: You've reached this session's free limit.
paywall_card.title: Keep talking with Flavia Plus
